name: mHC-lite Residual Mixing + Attention Sink Local Probe
author: Kbediako
score_scope: local RTX 5080 smoke train shard plus full validation; not an official leaderboard score
blurb: Clean-neural local probe adding optional mHC-lite softmax residual mixing and a causal per-head attention sink to the root sp1024 scaffold. No TTT, casefold, PPM, byte sidecar, external binary, or network dependency during evaluation. Two 8xH100 Runpod attempts exited before producing a score, so this is submitted as a non-record local-evidence package.
